Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB coding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurrenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Item.Text: MAGNA E-Car Systems GmbH & Co OG
MAGNA E-Car Systems GmbH & Co OG

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber
Data.Comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.AgingCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests /Clip import: Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enables P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl,)

Request.Name: DataRead.MBC ECU Identification - Hardware Part Number Read
DataRead.vehicle Manufacturer Renault Spare Part Number DataIdentifier KCH Read

Test.Description: The temperature in the control unit is too high.
The power supply in the system is unstable. Circuit Voltage Out of Range.
The temperature sensor of the control unit has a malfunction.
The USB connection has a malfunction. Circuit Current Above Threshold.
The mobile phone backup antenna has a malfunction. Circuit Short To Ground.
The mobile phone backup antenna has a malfunction. Circuit Short To Battery.
The mobile phone backup antenna has a malfunction. Circuit Open.
The SIM card of the control unit is blocked. Invalid / Incompatible Configuration.
Security processor update failed.
Security processor terminated. Component Internal Failure.
Software download failed.
Software rollback applied. System Programming Failures.
Update server error.
Mobile network timeout. Circuit Intermittent.
GPIO immobilizer reset due to system reset. Circuit Intermittent.
Main processor start-up error. Component Internal Failure.
The wake-up line has a malfunction.
System Voltage Low
System Voltage High
Battery Voltage Low
Battery Voltage High
Multifunction output 1 has a malfunction. Circuit Short To Ground.
Multifunction output 1 has a malfunction. Circuit Short To Battery.
Multifunction output 2 has a malfunction. Circuit Short To Ground.
Multifunction output 2 has a malfunction. Circuit Short To Battery.
The vehicle model series is incorrect. Invalid / Incompatible Configuration
The vehicle model series is incorrect. Missing Message
High Speed CAN Communication Bus Performance.BusOff.
Communication with the drivetrain CAN bus has a malfunction.
Vehicle Communication Bus A Performance (bus off)
Communication with the user interface CAN bus has a malfunction.
Vehicle Communication Bus E Performance (bus off)
Lost Communication With Vehicle Security Control Module
An internal fault has occurred in the control unit software. Watchdog / Safety μC Failure.
LIN bus 1 has a malfunction.
LIN bus 2 has a malfunction.
Communication with the control unit ''Card reader'' has a malfunction.
Communication with the control unit ''Electronic relay'' has a malfunction.
The control unit has an internal hardware fault.
